description: Run 20 real integration tests against the live production API (https://legalhelp.cl) simulating real Chilean users with realistic data for the most searched legal document types in Chile. Each test must achieve ready=true in 4-6 messages and then generate a document via /api/generate-final.
steps: Create a test script (can be inline bash with curl or a Node.js script) that tests each of the 20 cases against https://legalhelp.cl/api/chat and https://legalhelp.cl/api/generate-final

For each case: (1) Send initial message describing the legal need. (2) Respond to bot questions with realistic Chilean data (full name, RUT like 12.345.678-9, addresses in Chilean cities, realistic facts). (3) Track number of messages until ready=true. (4) Once ready=true, call /api/generate-final with the accumulated case data. (5) Verify document is generated (preview=true, document length > 200 chars).

The 20 test cases are: 1. Prescripcion deuda TAG, 2. Carta reclamo SERNAC (cobro indebido), 3. Finiquito laboral, 4. Despido injustificado, 5. Prescripcion deuda bancaria, 6. Carta reclamo isapre, 7. Contrato arriendo departamento, 8. Poder simple notarial, 9. Recurso de proteccion, 10. Demanda de alimentos, 11. Carta cobranza deuda, 12. Declaracion jurada simple, 13. Denuncia ruidos molestos, 14. Carta termino contrato arriendo, 15. Prescripcion multas transito, 16. Reclamo telecomunicaciones (Movistar/Entel), 17. Contrato trabajo indefinido, 18. Acuerdo pago deuda, 19. Carta renuncia voluntaria, 20. Eliminacion antecedentes penales

IMPORTANT: When the bot asks for data, GIVE IT realistic Chilean data. Respond naturally like a real client would. Example names: Maria Gonzalez Torres, Pedro Soto Ramirez, etc. Example RUTs: 15.432.876-5, 18.765.432-1. Example addresses: Av. Providencia 1234, depto 502, Providencia, Santiago.
Report PASS/FAIL for each test case with details: number of messages to ready, document generated yes/no, document length
acceptance_criteria: All 20 test cases are executed against the live production API
At least 18 out of 20 tests pass (ready=true in max 6 messages + document generated with length > 200)
Results are reported clearly showing PASS/FAIL for each case
The bot never asks for email or phone number in any test
verification: Review the test results output - at least 18/20 must pass
No test should show the bot asking for email or telefono
